title: GeyserGBJC
description:
GBJC ensures fair and native combat for both Java and Bedrock players on the same server.

Fully configurable, lightweight, and designed for Geyser
body:
# **⚔️ GBJC – GeyserBedrockJavaCombat**

Native combat for Java & Bedrock players on the same server

GBJC is a plugin designed to seamlessly bridge the combat differences between Java Edition and Bedrock Edition players on Geyser-powered servers.

When Java and Bedrock players play together, combat often feels unfair or unnatural for one side. GBJC solves this problem by giving every player the combat system they are used to, while still ensuring fair and consistent PvP interactions.


 
## 🎯 Purpose

The goal of GBJC is simple:

1. Java players keep their classic Vanilla Java combat system
2. Bedrock players experience their native Bedrock combat mechanics
3. Both platforms can play together without disadvantages or compromises
4. All of this works automatically, is highly configurable, and integrates perfectly with Geyser


## ✨ Key Features

- Platform-Based Combat Classes

- Automatic detection of Java & Bedrock players

- Automatic or manual assignment of combat classes

- Java Combat → Vanilla cooldown-based combat

- Bedrock Combat → Fast, simplified Bedrock-style combat


## 🔄 Smart PvP Detection (Fair Fight System)

- Detects PvP interactions in real time

- When a Bedrock player enters PvP, all involved players are temporarily switched to Java combat

- Ensures fair PvP mechanics

- Equal attack timing

- No platform-based advantage

- After the fight ends, players are automatically returned to their original combat class


## ⚙️ Advanced Configuration Options

- Server administrators have full control over every detail

- Default combat class on join

- Enable/disable Sweeping attacks

- Enable/disable PvP detection

- Manual damage values per weapon

- Define whether players can switch combat classes themselves (with additional permissions)

- World-specific enabling or disabling


## 🛠️ Automatic & Manual Class Management

- Automatic or forced combat class assignment on join

- Override combat behavior for testing or events

- Optional player commands for self-switching (configurable)


## 💬 Fully Customizable Messages

- All messages are configurable

- Supports color codes

- Perfect for server branding and localization


## 🧩 Built for Geyser

**_Its not an extension_**!!! It runs completely standalone and can even be used without Geyser

- GBJC was designed specifically for Java servers running Geyser

- No glitches or awkward workarounds, simple and robust native mechanics

- No changes to vanilla gameplay for Java players

- Bedrock players feel right at home

- Stable and performant even with mixed player bases


## 🚀 Ideal Use Cases

Perfect for:

🌍 Survival servers with Java & Bedrock players

⚔️ PvP or hybrid servers using Geyser

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Community servers with mixed platforms

🧪 Vanilla-focused servers that value fairness



## 📦 Design Philosophy


GBJC does not try to reinvent Minecraft combat. 
Instead, it focuses on preserving the native experience for each platform while making cross-platform gameplay fair and enjoyable.

One server. Two platforms. Fair combat.

made with 🤍 by nexio
